content_body: Arrived about 4:00 p.m. and we are just amazed at how beautiful this place is. I know its gonna be awesome!! Saturday, we were all up early, making breakfast, laughing, talking and just enjoying the majestic view. Played board games, pool, cooked (too much food) watched T.V, napped and ate again. Everyone is just relaxed and enjoying each others company. Celebrated 2 birthdays!! God is AWESOME!! Nothing like friends, family and lots of love. Thanks for making this a fabulous weekend! Love, Peace and Soul
title: Majestic View
